task.prompt: Fix the off-by-one bug in the range validation function.

patch.text:
diff --git a/range_check.py b/range_check.py
index 1234567..89abcde 100644
--- a/range_check.py
+++ b/range_check.py
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
 def is_within_range(value, start, end):
-    return start < value < end
+    return start <= value <= end

trace.final_message: Fixed the boundary condition and ran the tests.
